title: Better Creatures
description: A mod that adds some funny features to the vanilla  "useless"creatures !
body:
# Better Creatures

This mod aims to enhance Minecraft's less useful mobs by giving them fun and unique new functionalities!  

## The Pandadex  
Track and collect all the different types of pandas with the **Pandadex**, a craftable tool that records the pandas you've encountered. If you manage to find them all, you'll unlock the achievement: *"Gotta catch them all."*  

![The Pandadex almost complete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69b2f2843320597e1f04fd89081c8e6422d0cd3e.jpeg)  

## The Escaping Rabbit  
This special rabbit runs away from players at top speed, making it very hard to catch! If you manage to kill it, you'll be rewarded with valuable loot like carrots, gold, or rabbit hide.  

![The escaping rabbit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8964bd9786c446a0f05c5791cf24b46b2750b1a9.jpeg)  

## Llama Spit Upgrade  
When a llama spits on a player holding a piston, the piston is transformed into a sticky piston. 

![Llama spit turns a piston into a sticky piston](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e842f7b5af7a2b83724510685df67ae51010c0.jpeg)  

## Taller Snow Golems  
Using **Powder Snow**, you can make Snow Golems grow up to two extra tiers tall! These larger Snow Golems are also stronger and will always attack Blazes.  

![A four-tier Snow Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40fd4c8efebcbac065c9591199c4b52ffed68577.jpeg)
